vulnerabilities.title: Information disclosure in SSB-DB
vulnerabilities.description:
### Impact
_What kind of vulnerability is it? Who is impacted?_

Servers running SSB-DB 20.0.0 (which is packaged with SSB-Server 16.0.0) must upgrade immediately.

**There is no evidence that other SSB apps are vulnerable or that this problem has been exploited in the wild.**

The `get()` method is supposed to only decrypt messages when you explicitly ask it to, but there's a bug where it's decrypting any message that it can. This means that it's returning the decrypted content of private messa
